official_functions.role: Construct the official current-version vanilla KnownPack entry used by the packet fixture
Construct the official Configuration serverbound select_known_packs packet
Write the official Configuration serverbound select_known_packs body
Write the full Configuration serverbound framed select_known_packs packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration serverbound framed select_known_packs packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration serverbound state
Read the decoded known-pack list and official known-pack fields from the official packet instance

invariants: The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the select_known_packs body.
The official Configuration serverbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ServerboundSelectKnownPacks.
The decoded official ServerboundSelectKnownPacks preserves the KnownPack list produced by the official fixture constructor.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded known-pack list, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove registry hydration, known-pack negotiation completion, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer initialized registry state, known-pack negotiation completion, or Configuration-to-Play readiness.
